name: check_observability
description: Return a repo's observability health as a single JSON verdict: posture (G098 — wired/opted-out/exempt/undeclared), the most recent SLO-evidence verdict (G100), the trace-contract verdict (G080), and an `endpoints` block reporting which telemetry adapter is wired per (plane, signal) resolved read-only via observability-endpoint-resolve.sh --names-only. Wraps observability-check.sh (the canonical bash twin), which runs the three guards in report mode plus the read-only endpoint resolver. READ-ONLY: it never fetches, mutates, or captures live telemetry — the actual operate-plane telemetry capture done by ops agents flows through record_evidence instead. Use when an agent or operator needs a one-shot observability health read for a repo. Set repo_root to inspect a specific checkout; omit it to inspect the repo the server runs in.

repo_root.description: Absolute path to the repo root to inspect. Omit to inspect the repo this server runs in.
